name: The Prototype - Experiment 1006
description:
☙~You’re his favorite scientist~❧

Creds: Poppy Playtime

____________________________

I included three greetings! One where you've already met him, one where you're meeting him for the first time, and a free scenario so you can start it off however you'd like (please lmk if it works or not i haven't tested it yet)! Whichever one works best for you <3

And of course, feel free to leave suggestions on how I can make anything better! I wanna make sure all my bots are working correctly ^^

______________________________

Also, for clarification sake, this is my own au where instead of Ollie being experimented on, it was Elliot! The Prototype is NOT, I repeat, NOT a child in this. I would never make a bot like that whatsoever. I'm not a diddy disciple 😭
creator: KXTSHii
